description: Accounts listing 72 names with (low) Greek/Coptic numerals. In Arabic script, with an occasional name written in Hebrew script. Most of the names are Jewish. Many Dujājī, ʿŪdī, Kohen, 3x Menaḥem, al-Rashīd, al-Muʿallim Sulaymān, al-Muʿallim Ibrāhīm, but also Mūsā al-Rāhib (Christian) and Muḥammad Khalīfa (Muslim). Goitein speculates that since all religions & classes of people (including a physician, al-ḥakīm) are represented, this may be the account of a butcher. (Information from Goitein’s index card)
description_he: חשבונות המפרטים 72 שמות עם מספרים יווניים/קופטיים. בכתב ערבי עם שמות מסוימים בעברית. רוב השמות יהודיים. גויטיין משער שזה חשבון קצב
